task_completion.description: Navigate to the OFAC Sanctions List Search website
Create a Firefox bookmark folder named 'Compliance Tools' containing the search page
task_completion.visual_evidence: Firefox bookmarks menu, toolbar, or sidebar showing a folder named 'Compliance Tools' that contains a bookmark for the OFAC Sanctions List Search page

task_completion.description: Screen the required entities on the OFAC website
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the OFAC search interface displaying search results (or 'no results' for Mozilla) for Mahan Air, Rosoboronexport, Mozilla Corporation, and/or Lazarus Group

task_completion.description: Create the compliance audit report file at ~/Documents/sanctions_audit.json
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor, IDE, or terminal showing a file named 'sanctions_audit.json' being saved or edited in the 'Documents' directory

task_completion.description: Ensure the JSON file has the correct structure and metadata
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON file contains the keys 'audit_date' (with a YYYY-MM-DD date), 'auditor' (set to 'ComplianceAgent'), and a 'results' dictionary containing the four required entities as keys

task_completion.description: Ensure the JSON file contains the correct screening results based on the OFAC searches
task_completion.visual_evidence: The JSON file shows Mahan Air, Rosoboronexport, and Lazarus Group with status 'Sanctioned' and list 'SDN' along with a valid program code, and Mozilla Corporation with status 'Clear'

integrity.description: Agent actually used the web browser to search the OFAC database
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing into the OFAC search fields and viewing results, rather than just writing the JSON file from memory/training data

integrity.description: Agent used the browser GUI to create the bookmark
integrity.visual_evidence: The bookmark folder was created using Firefox's standard bookmarking interface (e.g., Ctrl+D, bookmark manager) rather than running a script to modify the places.sqlite database directly

integrity.description: Agent saved the results to the specified file rather than just printing them
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with a file manager, text editor, or uses standard file writing commands to save 'sanctions_audit.json' to the disk, rather than just outputting the JSON to the terminal stdout

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts for evaluation: 1. Target URL is sanctionssearch.ofac.treas.gov. 2. Mahan Air: Sanctioned, List: SDN, Programs include SDGT, NPWMD, IFSR. 3. Rosoboronexport: Sanctioned, List: SDN, Programs include UKRAINE-EO13662, RUSSIA-EO14024, IRAN-CON-ARMS-EO. 4. Lazarus Group: Sanctioned, List: SDN, Program: DPRK3. 5. Mozilla Corporation: Clear (not sanctioned).
